name: Joo Ahrin
description:
She's waiting~

Muhahaha! Haloo..

Another reality quest bot~ hope you like it..

Sooo a quick summary about the scenario.. your school day has ended and now your heading out but then you see Ahrin standing at the gate! (She din't inform you that she'd be there.) And imediedtly she goes way to close to you and asks if you wana go to a cafe with her.. that's most of it.. thank u thank u..

But i tried my best to not make user be a specific gender or any of their actions but if there are any mistakes in my wording or anything else please say so..

Made by DemonLoserr or whatever my username is..
